'''鈭歞h-t-sh''' ('''kadhatash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zipper|zipper]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-t-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zipper|zipper]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-t-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kadhatash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhatash|thidhatash]] || [[word:jidhatash|jidhatash]] || [[word:shidhatash|shidhatash]] || [[word:kidhatash|kidhatash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhatash|thuthudhatash]] || [[word:jujudhatash|jujudhatash]] || [[word:shushudhatash|shushudhatash]] || [[word:kukudhatash|kukudhatash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhatash|thudhatash]] || [[word:judhatash|judhatash]] || [[word:shudhatash|shudhatash]] || [[word:kudhatash|kudhatash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhatash|thudhatash]] || [[word:judhatash|judhatash]] || [[word:shudhatash|shudhatash]] || [[word:kudhatash|kudhatash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhatash|thedhatash]] || [[word:jedhatash|jedhatash]] || [[word:shedhatash|shedhatash]] || [[word:kedhatash|kedhatash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhatash|thothodhatash]] || [[word:jojodhatash|jojodhatash]] || [[word:shoshodhatash|shoshodhatash]] || [[word:kokodhatash|kokodhatash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhatash|thodhatash]] || [[word:jodhatash|jodhatash]] || [[word:shodhatash|shodhatash]] || [[word:kodhatash|kodhatash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhatash|thodhatash]] || [[word:jodhatash|jodhatash]] || [[word:shodhatash|shodhatash]] || [[word:kodhatash|kodhatash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhatash|dhatash]] || [[word:dhatash|dhatash]] || [[word:dhatash|dhatash]] || [[word:dhatash|dhatash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhatash|dhatash]] || [[word:dhatash|dhatash]] || [[word:dhatash|dhatash]] || [[word:dhatash|dhatash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhatash|dhatash]] || [[word:dhatash|dhatash]] || [[word:dhatash|dhatash]] || [[word:dhatash|dhatash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhatash|dhatash]] || [[word:dhatash|dhatash]] || [[word:dhatash|dhatash]] || [[word:dhatash|dhatash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhatash|th忙dhatash]] || [[word:j忙dhatash|j忙dhatash]] || [[word:sh忙dhatash|sh忙dhatash]] || [[word:k忙dhatash|k忙dhatash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhatash|thathadhatash]] || [[word:jajadhatash|jajadhatash]] || [[word:shashadhatash|shashadhatash]] || [[word:kakadhatash|kakadhatash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhatash|thadhatash]] || [[word:jadhatash|jadhatash]] || [[word:shadhatash|shadhatash]] || [[word:kadhatash|kadhatash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhatash|thadhatash]] || [[word:jadhatash|jadhatash]] || [[word:shadhatash|shadhatash]] || [[word:kadhatash|kadhatash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhatash|shadhatash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhatash|goshadhatash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhatash|gokishadhatash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhatashn眉|shadhatashn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhatashnkn眉|goshadhatashnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhatashn眉|gokishadhatashn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhatashsh毛|shadhatashsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhatashnksh毛|goshadhatashnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhatashsh毛|gokishadhatashsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhatashro|shadhatashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhatashnkro|goshadhatashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhatashro|gokishadhatashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhatashmu|shadhatashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhatashnkmu|goshadhatashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhatashmu|gokishadhatashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhatashsher|shadhatashsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhatashnksher|goshadhatashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhatashsher|gokishadhatashsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhatashng|shadhatashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhatashnkng|goshadhatashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhatashng|gokishadhatashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhatashya|shadhatashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhatashnkya|goshadhatashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhatashya|gokishadhatashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhatashyam|shadhatashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhatashnkyam|goshadhatashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhatashyam|gokishadhatashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhatashn眉sh毛|shadhatashn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhatashnkn眉sh毛|goshadhatashnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhatashn眉sh毛|gokishadhatashn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhatashn眉ro|shadhatashn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhatashnkn眉ro|goshadhatashnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhatashn眉ro|gokishadhatashn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhatashn眉mu|shadhatashn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhatashnkn眉mu|goshadhatashnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhatashn眉mu|gokishadhatashn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhatashsh毛n眉|shadhatashsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhatashnksh毛n眉|goshadhatashnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhatashsh毛n眉|gokishadhatashsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhatashsh毛ro|shadhatashsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhatashnksh毛ro|goshadhatashnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhatashsh毛ro|gokishadhatashsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhatashsh毛mu|shadhatashsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhatashnksh毛mu|goshadhatashnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhatashsh毛mu|gokishadhatashsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhatashron眉|shadhatashron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhatashnkron眉|goshadhatashnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhatashron眉|gokishadhatashron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhatashrosh毛|shadhatashrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhatashnkrosh毛|goshadhatashnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhatashrosh毛|gokishadhatashrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhatashromu|shadhatashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhatashnkromu|goshadhatashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhatashromu|gokishadhatashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhatashmun眉|shadhatashmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhatashnkmun眉|goshadhatashnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhatashmun眉|gokishadhatashmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhatashmush毛|shadhatashmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhatashnkmush毛|goshadhatashnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhatashmush毛|gokishadhatashmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhatashmuro|shadhatashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhatashnkmuro|goshadhatashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhatashmuro|gokishadhatashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
